subject: a bearded male figure pressing a blade flat against his own forehead, close-up portrait
description: An extreme close-up portrait of a heavily bearded male figure. He presses a blade flat against his forehead, the edge running along his brow line, with visible blood. He wears a cloth headband or bandage. His gaze is directed toward the viewer — intense, strained, unflinching. His forearm is visible, bearing a tattoo with a design that is illegible at this resolution. He wears dark clothing, possibly armored. The lighting is harsh and high-contrast: a bright white source from below left washes his face in stark light against a pale, nearly blown-out background. The mood is one of grim endurance and controlled violence.
foreground: bearded male figure holding a blade against his forehead, heavily detailed face and forearm with tattoo
emotion: grim endurance — eyes fixed on the viewer, expression controlled and intense despite apparent pain
